title: Access trees for inspection
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Access trees for inspection demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare site and inspect equipment

pcs.text: Confirm access to site and scope of works according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm access to site and scope of works according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm access to site and scope of works according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA), record and implement control measures according to workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA), record and implement control measures according to workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA), record and implement control measures according to workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Confirm availability of first aid and rescue personnel, equipment and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm availability of first aid and rescue personnel, equipment and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm availability of first aid and rescue personnel, equipment and procedures.

pcs.text: Conduct pre-operational preparations and safety checks, on ropes, harnesses, tools and climbing equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct pre-operational preparations and safety checks, on ropes, harnesses, tools and climbing equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct pre-operational preparations and safety checks, on ropes, harnesses, tools and climbing equipment.

pcs.text: Select, check and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use personal protective equipment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare site and inspect equipment

elements.title: Prepare to access tree

pcs.text: Inspect tree to determine efficient low-risk access route and climbing method through discussion with work team
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect tree to determine efficient low-risk access route and climbing method through discussion with work team?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect tree to determine efficient low-risk access route and climbing method through discussion with work team.

pcs.text: Select and prepare climbing equipment according to manufacturer instructions, workplace health and safety regulations and industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare climbing equipment according to manufacturer instructions, workplace health and safety regulations and industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare climbing equipment according to manufacturer instructions, workplace health and safety regulations and industry standards.

pcs.text: Configure climbing equipment components to form functional tree climbing system appropriate to the access method selected
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Configure climbing equipment components to form functional tree climbing system appropriate to the access method selected?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Configure climbing equipment components to form functional tree climbing system appropriate to the access method selected.

pcs.text: Tie, dress, set and finish climbing knots and hitches according to climbing system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Tie, dress, set and finish climbing knots and hitches according to climbing system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Tie, dress, set and finish climbing knots and hitches according to climbing system.

pcs.text: Conduct pre-climb checks of configured systems to ensure compatibility, safety and function according to selected climbing system, industry standards and manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct pre-climb checks of configured systems to ensure compatibility, safety and function according to selected climbing system, industry standards and manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct pre-climb checks of configured systems to ensure compatibility, safety and function according to selected climbing system, industry standards and manufacturer instructions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare to access tree

elements.title: Access tree safely to work position

pcs.text: Select and install suitable anchor points according to access method selected
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and install suitable anchor points according to access method selected?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and install suitable anchor points according to access method selected.

pcs.text: Use climbing equipment to ascend tree to suitable work positions within crown using safe access route
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use climbing equipment to ascend tree to suitable work positions within crown using safe access route?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use climbing equipment to ascend tree to suitable work positions within crown using safe access route.

pcs.text: Undertake transitions between attachment points safely to reach suitable work positions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake transitions between attachment points safely to reach suitable work positions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake transitions between attachment points safely to reach suitable work positions.

pcs.text: Communicate with work team during operations according to work site and environmental conditions using methods agreed with work team
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with work team during operations according to work site and environmental conditions using methods agreed with work team?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with work team during operations according to work site and environmental conditions using methods agreed with work team.

pcs.text: Maintain awareness and clearances to avoid power lines according to workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain awareness and clearances to avoid power lines according to workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain awareness and clearances to avoid power lines according to workplace safety procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Access tree safely to work position

elements.title: Descend from tree

pcs.text: Descend tree using climbing equipment in a controlled manner
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Descend tree using climbing equipment in a controlled manner?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Descend tree using climbing equipment in a controlled manner.

pcs.text: Remove all climbing equipment safely in a controlled manner according to manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove all climbing equipment safely in a controlled manner according to manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove all climbing equipment safely in a controlled manner according to manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Inspect, clean, maintain and store climbing and safety equipment according to manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect, clean, maintain and store climbing and safety equipment according to manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect, clean, maintain and store climbing and safety equipment according to manufacturer instructions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Descend from tree
